  simp only [addEquivAddHaarChar_eq_abs_det, AddMonoidHom.map_prod]

let L := IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V

    have h_fg : Module.Finite ℤ L := inferInstance

let b := Module.Basis.ofVectorSpace ℚ V

    let b := Module.Basis.ofVectorSpace ℚ V

    have h_int : ∀ᶠ v in Filter.cofinite, ∀ i j,

    -- The range is the span of the basis b over the integers O_v

    let S := (((Aux.c_v_alg V v)).toAddMonoidHom.comp
          (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)

    -- Aux.c_v_alg maps the integral basis to b, so S is the span of b over Ov

    rw [hS, Set.BijOn]

    · intro x hx
      simp only [Submodule.mem_span_range_iff_exists_fun] at hx ⊢

        rcases hx with ⟨c, rfl⟩

        simp only [φv, Aux.continuousBaseChange, ContinuousLinearEquiv.symm_mk,

      let ψ := (Aux.c_v_alg V v).toLinearMap.comp (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) R_v.subtype.toIntLinearMap)

      have : (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V) R_v.subtype.toIntLinearMap).range =

        -- This step requires carefully unfolding lTensor range.

        rw [TensorProduct.sum_tmul]
        refine Submodule.sum_mem _ (fun j _ ↦ ?_)

      · intro _ _ h1 h2; exact Submodule.add_mem _ h1 h2
      · intro c _ h; exact Submodule.smul_mem _ c h
    refine ⟨h_inv M hM, h_inv Minv hMinv, φ_v.injective.injOn _⟩
